title: MCP Design Tools for CRUD operations on design files
purpose: Provides tools for creating, reading, updating, deleting, and exporting design files stored as .design.json in session folders.
module_context: Exports interfaces for design data structures and schemas for API request validation, along with async handler functions for each CRUD operation.

methods.name: buildUrl
methods.normalized_params: (path: string, project: string, session: string, extraParams?: Record<string, string>): string

steps.content: Construct a URL using the base API endpoint and provided path.
Add project and session as query parameters to the URL.
IF extra parameters are provided, append them to the URL search parameters.
Return the fully constructed URL string.

methods.name: handleCreateDesign
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, name: string, content: any): Promise<CreateDesignResult>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API endpoint for creating a design.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an error.
ELSE parse the response JSON to extract the created design ID.
Return a success result with the ID of the created design.

methods.name: handleUpdateDesign
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, content: any): Promise<UpdateDesignResult>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API endpoint for updating a design.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an error.
ELSE return a success result with the ID of the updated design.

methods.name: handleGetDesign
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<GetDesignResult>

steps.content: Send a GET request to the API endpoint for retrieving a design.
IF the response indicates failure, throw an error indicating the design was not found.
ELSE parse the response JSON to extract design data.
IF the content is a string, parse it as JSON.
Return the parsed design data with name, ID, content, and last modified timestamp.
Send a GET request to the API endpoint for listing designs.
IF the response indicates failure, throw an error indicating the listing failed.
ELSE parse the response JSON to extract the list of designs.
Return the list of designs in a result object.

methods.name: handleDeleteDesign
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<DeleteDesignResult>

steps.content: Send a DELETE request to the API endpoint for deleting a design.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an error.
ELSE return a success result indicating the design was deleted.

methods.name: handleExportDesign
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, format?: string, scale?: number, outputPath?: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; filePath: string; format: string; size: number }>

steps.content: Send a POST request to the API endpoint for exporting a design.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an error.
ELSE read the response as an array buffer and convert it to a Uint8Array.
Determine the file extension based on the format parameter.
IF an output path is provided, use it; otherwise, generate a temporary file path.
Write the binary data to the specified file path.
Return a success result with the file path, format, and size.
